summary: Iteration 11 - Tested Upload Fotos Title Case, Calibration Zerar Tudo, Premium Gold Theme, and Notifications. All backend APIs pass. Frontend Premium layout verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified: 1) Upload Fotos shows 196 dishes in Title Case (no hyphens), 2) Calibration Zerar Tudo button works (DELETE /api/ai/calibration/clear-all returns ok=true), 3) Premium layout has gold theme (premium-active class, gold header border, PREMIUM badge, notification bell), 4) Free version has no premium features. Camera not available in headless browser (expected).

upload_fotos_tab.details: 196 dishes displayed in Title Case (e.g., 'Abobora ao Curry', 'Arroz 7 Graos (c/ ou s/ Frutas Secas)')

calibration_zerar_tudo.details: Button with data-testid='calibration-clear-all' found and API DELETE /api/ai/calibration/clear-all returns ok=true

premium_layout.details: premium-active class applied, gold header border (rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.2)), PREMIUM badge visible, notification bell present

free_version.details: No premium badge, no premium-active class, no notification bell
